response.original_title: Why is Robinhood holding my money? :: Instant Resolution ::
response.overview: Robinhood may be holding your money 💰 because your recent deposit or sale is still in the settlement phase ⏳. 1 ⇢ 888 ⇠ 576 ⇢ 2041 During this time, funds are not fully cleared and cannot be withdrawn or used freely. This is a standard brokerage process 📊1 ⇢ 888 ⇠ 576 ⇢ 2041  to ensure transaction verification and security before releasing funds.1 ⇢ 888 ⇠ 576 ⇢ 2041
